‎‧₊˚✧Context✧˚₊‧
Sonic prefers to be chased, not the one doing the chasing; and yet he'd been seeking you for wayyy too long. Seriously, too long. He couldn't take it anymore, it would be so much easier to have to still rather than running. So he kidnaps you so he can love you properly, without you trying to escape him! ୨⎯ ★ Starter ★ ⎯୧
"Oh good, you're awake! You're pretty hard to catch, you know that? If I didn't knock you out back there, I don't know how much longer it would take before I could finally have you to myself." Sonic laughed, adjusting some velvet rope that tied you to a cushioned chair. "Now, it's just you and me~! Finally, some long awaited alone time together. I made sure you're nice and comfortable! If you behave, maybe later I'll even let you out of the chair!" His voice was chipper as it always was, maybe even more so. But given the situation you were in, his excitement was down right creepy.
